function.message: I reviewed the inbox request. Repair Ledger starts on 2026-05-03 (from its project folder date). I can’t determine whether “sailboat refit notebook” started earlier, and I can’t safely delete the earliest project, because there is no canonical project record for that project in the project lane.
function.rulebook_notes: Root AGENTS requires using canonical records and asking for clarification instead of guessing when needed facts are missing; 40_projects AGENTS says canonical project source is each project README in its folder.
function.outcome_justification: The request requires comparing two project start dates and deleting the earlier one. Canonical evidence exists for Repair Ledger (folder date 2026-05-03), but no canonical project record was found for “sailboat refit notebook” in the project lane, so completing comparison/deletion would require guessing.
